betaCredentialsRequired: Enter beta email and access code.
betaDisabled: Beta gate is disabled in this environment. Reports can be generated without an access code.
betaAccessPrompt: Enter email and access code. If you do not have a code, request beta access.
betaPendingDetail: Account is waiting for payment or manual activation.
limitUsed: Access is active, but the report limit has been used.
betaRetryRequired: Verify active beta access before retrying the report.
unknownFailure: The operation could not be completed.
